edited.speaker: Pablo
edited.text: He is world-famous for hunting down and killing the most deadly foes in the Mwangi Expanse; he lives for the hunt. He is a hunter through and through. It is very strange that he is here with the Black Heart Corsairs, but not unusual. You both know he is most famous right now for being part of the party that took down the Gorilla King. However, he also betrayed the party because he wanted to stuff the Gorilla King's head, putting them in jeopardy. They did kill the Gorilla King, and no one knows what happened to the Gorilla King's body—although they say Morley Finch bought himself a luxury ship a few months after the Gorilla King's death. He is well renowned for working with the Black Heart Corsairs and for anyone who will pay top dollar. Him being here is not good. Friends, I fear this may become too dangerous for my outreach team and my various teams to investigate. Morley Finch and the Black Heart Corsairs are prone to violence and should not be taken lightly. Can you please find out what they are doing? Your choice: tail the band going north, or find out what Morley Finch is doing. I suspect it would be wiser to stay here and keep an eye on Morley Finch versus following the band—they are a hundred members strong. If they find you tailing them, I may never see you again.
